examLabel: NETSAT ภาษาอังกฤษ (มข.)

blueprint.note: Reading รวม 20 ข้อจาก 2 บท (สั้น+ยาว); ให้คะแนนถ่วงน้ำหนัก 2/3/4

writingError.stem: By the time the school inspectors (A)[arrived at] the laboratory last Friday, the senior students (B)[have already completed] most of the chemical experiments (C)[that their] teacher (D)[had assigned] earlier that week.
writingError.explanation_th: เหตุการณ์เสร็จก่อนอดีต (by the time + past) ต้องใช้ Past Perfect → had already completed

writingError.stem: The committee praised the volunteers for their (A)[dedicated work] during the flood, saying that such (B)[generous actions] clearly showed the (C)[important] of community spirit in (D)[difficult times].
writingError.explanation_th: หลัง the ต้องเป็นคำนาม → the importance of community spirit (important เป็น adj.)

writingError.stem: The famous author, (A)[who latest novel] explores life in rural Thailand, (B)[will visit] our school next month (C)[to discuss] the characters (D)[that inspired] her story.
writingError.explanation_th: แสดงความเป็นเจ้าของ (นิยายของเธอ) ต้องใช้ whose → whose latest novel

writingError.stem: The new library, which (A)[is expected] to open next semester, (B)[is being build] by a construction company (C)[that specializes] in (D)[environmentally friendly] designs.
writingError.explanation_th: Passive ต้องใช้ V3 → is being built (build → built)

writingError.stem: Online learning is often considered (A)[more convenient] than traditional classrooms, but many students admit that face-to-face discussion is (B)[the most effective] of the two methods (C)[for developing] (D)[critical thinking] skills.
writingError.explanation_th: เปรียบเทียบของ 2 สิ่ง ใช้ขั้นกว่า → the more effective of the two (superlative ใช้กับ 3 ขึ้นไป)

writingError.stem: The research team collected water samples from the river, (A)[analyzed them] in the laboratory, and (B)[publishing] the results in an international journal (C)[that focuses] on (D)[environmental science].
writingError.explanation_th: โครงสร้างขนาน (parallelism): collected, analyzed, and published — ต้องเป็น V2 เหมือนกัน

writingError.stem: After the long meeting, the committee finally reached (A)[an unanimous] decision to build (B)[a new] dormitory near the sports complex (C)[for students] (D)[who live] far from school.
writingError.explanation_th: unanimous ออกเสียงขึ้นต้น /ju/ (เสียงพยัญชนะ) → ใช้ a unanimous decision

writingError.stem: The collection of rare Thai manuscripts, together with several ancient maps donated by local historians, (A)[were displayed] in the school library (B)[where visitors] (C)[could examine] them (D)[under strict] supervision.
writingError.explanation_th: ประธานหลักคือ The collection (เอกพจน์) — together with ไม่เปลี่ยนพจน์ → was displayed

writingError.stem: (A)[Despite] the heavy rain continued for several hours, thousands of fans (B)[remained outside] the stadium (C)[because they] wanted to welcome the national team (D)[after its] historic victory.
writingError.explanation_th: Despite + คำนาม/V-ing เท่านั้น — ตามด้วยประโยคต้องใช้ Although the heavy rain continued

writingError.stem: (A)[Exhausting] from the long journey across three provinces, the young athletes decided (B)[to rest] at the hotel (C)[instead of] attending the welcome ceremony (D)[organized by] the host school.
writingError.explanation_th: นักกีฬา 'ถูกทำให้เหนื่อย' ต้องใช้ V3 → Exhausted from the long journey (participle บอกความรู้สึก)

writingError.stem: If the weather forecast (A)[had been] more accurate last weekend, the organizers (B)[would not cancel] the outdoor concert (C)[that thousands] of people (D)[had been] waiting to attend.
writingError.explanation_th: If clause 3 (had been) คู่กับ would not have cancelled — เหตุการณ์อดีตที่ตรงข้ามความจริง

writingError.stem: The students could not understand (A)[why did the schedule change] so suddenly, so they asked the office (B)[to explain] the reasons (C)[behind the] decision (D)[in a] formal letter.
writingError.explanation_th: Indirect question ไม่สลับประธาน-กริยา → why the schedule changed so suddenly

writingError.stem: The principal told the students that (A)[she would] announce the results soon, and that (B)[whoever scored] highest would receive a scholarship, which made (C)[they] extremely excited about (D)[the upcoming] ceremony.
writingError.explanation_th: หลัง made ต้องเป็นกรรม → made them extremely excited (they เป็นรูปประธาน)

writingError.stem: The doctor advised my grandfather (A)[to avoid] (B)[to eat] salty food and (C)[to exercise] gently every morning (D)[in order] to control his blood pressure.
writingError.explanation_th: avoid + V-ing เสมอ → avoid eating salty food

writingError.stem: The committee recommended that every candidate (A)[submits] a portfolio of previous work (B)[before the] interview, (C)[so that] the judges could evaluate (D)[each applicant] fairly.
writingError.explanation_th: recommend that + subjunctive ใช้กริยาช่องฐาน → every candidate submit (ไม่เติม s)

writingError.stem: Since the new principal (A)[took office] in 2023, the number of students joining academic clubs (B)[has increased] steadily, and many teachers (C)[believe the] trend (D)[will continuing] for several years.
writingError.explanation_th: will + กริยาช่องฐาน → will continue (ไม่ใช่ will continuing)

writingError.stem: Although the documentary was (A)[surprisingly long], the audience remained (B)[attention] throughout the screening because the director presented the issue in a (C)[creative and] (D)[powerful way].
writingError.explanation_th: หลัง remained ต้องเป็นคำคุณศัพท์ → remained attentive (attention เป็นคำนาม)

writingError.stem: Students (A)[who wants] to join the exchange program (B)[must submit] their applications (C)[before the] end of June, (D)[along with] two recommendation letters from their teachers.
writingError.explanation_th: who แทน Students (พหูพจน์) กริยาไม่เติม s → who want to join

writingError.stem: All the scholarship winners (A)[were informing] by email yesterday, and they (B)[are required] to confirm their acceptance (C)[before the] official announcement (D)[is made] next Monday.
writingError.explanation_th: ผู้ชนะ 'ถูกแจ้ง' ต้องเป็น Passive → were informed by email

writingError.stem: The new gymnasium is (A)[far larger] than the old one, yet the air inside feels (B)[more fresher] because the architects installed (C)[an advanced] ventilation system (D)[along the] upper walls.
writingError.explanation_th: ใช้ขั้นกว่าซ้อนกันไม่ได้ (double comparative) → fresher หรือ much fresher

writingError.stem: (A)[Because the] museum offers free admission on Sundays, (B)[attracts] thousands of visitors every weekend, especially families (C)[who want] to enjoy art (D)[without spending] money.
writingError.explanation_th: ประโยคหลักขาดประธาน → it attracts thousands of visitors

writingError.stem: (A)[The honesty] is one of the qualities that employers value most, (B)[so applicants] should answer every interview question (C)[truthfully, even] when the truth (D)[is not] impressive.
writingError.explanation_th: คำนามนามธรรมความหมายทั่วไปไม่ใช้ the → Honesty is one of the qualities

writingError.stem: Neither the coach nor the players (A)[was aware] that the schedule of the regional tournaments (B)[had been] changed, so everyone (C)[arrived at] the stadium (D)[three hours] too early.
writingError.explanation_th: neither...nor ผันกริยาตามประธานตัวใกล้ (the players พหูพจน์) → were aware

writingError.stem: The students worked hard on their science project; (A)[however, they] failed to win a prize (B)[because of] the judges felt the experiment (C)[lacked originality] and (D)[was poorly] documented.
writingError.explanation_th: because of + คำนาม/V-ing เท่านั้น — ตามด้วยประโยคต้องใช้ because the judges felt

writingError.stem: The manager suggested (A)[to postpone] the meeting until next week (B)[so that] every department (C)[could prepare] the financial documents (D)[required for] the annual review.
writingError.explanation_th: suggest + V-ing เสมอ → suggested postponing the meeting

writingError.stem: (A)[Unless the] government takes immediate action against plastic waste, marine animals (B)[would continue] to suffer, and future generations (C)[will inherit] oceans (D)[filled with] pollution.
writingError.explanation_th: เงื่อนไขแบบที่ 1 (Unless + present) ผลต้องใช้ will → will continue to suffer

writingError.stem: (A)[Hardly the bell had rung] when hundreds of students rushed out of their classrooms, (B)[filling the] corridors with noise (C)[and excitement] (D)[before the] holiday began.
writingError.explanation_th: ขึ้นต้นด้วย Hardly ต้องสลับเป็น inversion → Hardly had the bell rung when...

writingError.stem: My brother and (A)[me] volunteered at the animal shelter last summer, (B)[where we] learned how to care for injured dogs (C)[before they] were sent (D)[to their] new homes.
writingError.explanation_th: ตำแหน่งประธานต้องใช้ I → My brother and I volunteered

writingError.stem: We look forward (A)[to receive] your reply about the student exchange program, (B)[which will] allow our learners (C)[to experience] a new culture (D)[during the] summer break.
writingError.explanation_th: look forward to + V-ing (to เป็น preposition) → look forward to receiving

writingError.stem: It is essential that the laboratory equipment (A)[is checked] carefully before each experiment (B)[begins, because] even a small error (C)[could put] students (D)[in serious] danger.
writingError.explanation_th: It is essential that + subjunctive → equipment be checked (ใช้ be ไม่ใช่ is)

writingError.stem: While the science teacher (A)[was explaining] the experiment yesterday afternoon, several students in the back row (B)[are taking] notes carefully (C)[so that] they could review the steps (D)[before the] practical test.
writingError.explanation_th: เหตุการณ์คู่ขนานในอดีต (while + was explaining) ต้องใช้ Past Continuous → were taking notes

writingError.stem: Scientists are searching for a (A)[solve] to the plastic problem because tiny particles (B)[have been] found in rivers, (C)[threatening fish] and other animals (D)[that depend] on clean water.
writingError.explanation_th: หลัง a ต้องเป็นคำนาม → a solution to the problem (solve เป็นกริยา)

writingError.stem: The scholarship will be given to the student (A)[which essay] shows the deepest understanding of Thai culture and (B)[whose presentation] can convince the judges (C)[that the] project will benefit (D)[the local] community.
writingError.explanation_th: แสดงความเป็นเจ้าของ (เรียงความของนักเรียน) ต้องใช้ whose → whose essay shows

writingError.stem: A new scholarship program (A)[will be launch] next semester to support students from low-income families (B)[who wish] to study engineering (C)[at leading] universities (D)[around the] country.
writingError.explanation_th: Passive ต้องใช้ V3 → will be launched

writingError.stem: Travelling by train across the region is usually (A)[cheaper than] flying, and many passengers say the views from the window are (B)[much more beautiful that] the scenery (C)[seen from] (D)[an airplane].
writingError.explanation_th: ขั้นกว่าต้องคู่กับ than → more beautiful than (ไม่ใช่ that)

writingError.stem: Volunteering at the hospital (A)[teaches young] people responsibility, (B)[it] also helps them decide whether a medical career suits them, (C)[so many] schools now encourage students (D)[to join] such programs.
writingError.explanation_th: เชื่อมสองประโยคด้วย comma เฉย ๆ ไม่ได้ (comma splice) → and it also helps

writingError.stem: My uncle works as (A)[engineer] at a power plant in Rayong, (B)[where he] inspects the machines every morning (C)[to make] sure the systems (D)[operate safely].
writingError.explanation_th: อาชีพนับได้เอกพจน์ต้องมี article → works as an engineer

writingError.stem: Each of the new exchange students (A)[were given] a Thai buddy on the first day (B)[to help] them adjust to school life and (C)[to explain] the rules (D)[that everyone] must follow.
writingError.explanation_th: Each of + พหูพจน์ กริยาเป็นเอกพจน์เสมอ → was given

writingError.stem: (A)[Because of] the school closed early for the sports day, many students went to the library in town (B)[so that] they could finish their group reports (C)[before the] deadline (D)[at the] end of the week.
writingError.explanation_th: Because of + นาม/V-ing — ตามด้วยประโยคต้องใช้ Because the school closed early

writingError.stem: The teacher heard the students (A)[to argue] loudly in the hallway and immediately walked out of the office (B)[to find] out (C)[what had] caused (D)[such a] serious disagreement.
writingError.explanation_th: กริยารับรู้ hear + กรรม + V-ing/V ช่องฐาน → heard the students arguing (ห้ามใช้ to)

writingError.stem: If students (A)[will review] their notes regularly instead of waiting until the night before the exam, they (B)[will remember] the material much better and (C)[feel far] less anxious (D)[during the] test.
writingError.explanation_th: If clause แบบที่ 1 ใช้ Present Simple (ห้ามใส่ will ใน if clause) → If students review

writingError.stem: The librarian asked us (A)[what time would the meeting start] because she needed (B)[to prepare] the conference room (C)[and arrange] the documents (D)[before everyone] arrived.
options: (A) what time would the meeting start
writingError.explanation_th: Indirect question ไม่สลับกริยา → what time the meeting would start

writingError.stem: The director reminded the staff that (A)[whoever leaves] the laboratory last must check the equipment, lock the doors, and return the keys to the office so that (B)[it] can be stored safely (C)[until the] next (D)[working day].
writingError.explanation_th: the keys เป็นพหูพจน์ สรรพนามต้องใช้ they → so that they can be stored

writingError.stem: The coach made the players (A)[to run] ten laps around the field after they arrived late, (B)[reminding them] that discipline (C)[is just] as important (D)[as talent].
writingError.explanation_th: make + กรรม + กริยาช่องฐาน (ไม่มี to) → made the players run

writingError.stem: The school nurse insisted that the injured player (A)[goes] to the hospital immediately, even though he claimed (B)[that the] pain was not serious and (C)[that he] could continue (D)[playing in] the second half.
writingError.explanation_th: insist that + subjunctive ใช้กริยาช่องฐาน → the player go (ไม่เติม es)

writingError.stem: My cousin (A)[has worked] at the provincial hospital since 2019, and next April she (B)[will have completing] her seventh year (C)[of service], which makes our whole family (D)[extremely proud] of her.
writingError.explanation_th: Future Perfect = will have + V3 → will have completed

writingError.stem: The students answered the interview questions so (A)[confident] that the committee immediately offered them places in the (B)[international program], (C)[which accepts] only twenty learners (D)[each academic] year.
writingError.explanation_th: ขยายกริยา answered ต้องใช้ adverb → answered so confidently

writingError.stem: Khon Kaen, (A)[that is] one of the largest provinces in the northeast, (B)[hosts an] international marathon every January, (C)[attracting runners] (D)[from all] over the world.
writingError.explanation_th: non-restrictive clause (หลัง comma) ใช้ that ไม่ได้ → which is one of the largest

writingError.stem: The ancient manuscripts (A)[must handle] with great care because the paper is extremely fragile and (B)[can be] damaged easily (C)[by sunlight], moisture, (D)[or careless] visitors.
writingError.explanation_th: เอกสาร 'ถูกจับ' ต้องเป็น Passive → must be handled with great care

writingError.stem: Of all the candidates interviewed this morning, Ms. Pranee gave (A)[the clearer] answers and showed (B)[the strongest] motivation, (C)[so the] committee decided to offer her (D)[the position] immediately.
writingError.explanation_th: เปรียบเทียบในกลุ่ม 3 คนขึ้นไป (of all) ใช้ขั้นสูงสุด → the clearest answers

writingError.stem: (A)[Although the] road to the mountain village is narrow and steep, (B)[but] hundreds of cyclists attempt the climb every winter (C)[because the] view from the summit (D)[is absolutely] breathtaking.
writingError.explanation_th: Although กับ but ใช้คู่กันในประโยคเดียวไม่ได้ → ตัด but ออก

writingError.stem: We spent two weeks travelling around (A)[the Japan] last spring, visiting ancient castles, (B)[tasting local] dishes, and (C)[learning a] few phrases (D)[of the] language.
writingError.explanation_th: ชื่อประเทศทั่วไปไม่ใช้ the → travelling around Japan

writingError.stem: The number of tourists visiting the ancient temples in Ayutthaya (A)[have risen] sharply this year (B)[because several] airlines now offer (C)[direct flights] from major cities (D)[across Asia].
writingError.explanation_th: The number of + พหูพจน์ ถือเป็นเอกพจน์ → has risen (ต่างจาก A number of = พหูพจน์)

writingError.stem: The marathon runner felt severe pain in her knee during the final lap, (A)[but she] refused to stop (B)[despite of] the doctor's warning, (C)[which impressed] thousands of spectators (D)[watching along] the route.
writingError.explanation_th: despite ไม่มี of → despite the warning (หรือ in spite of the warning)

writingError.stem: The lost tourists asked a local vendor for directions, (A)[hoping to] reach the famous floating market (B)[before it] closed, but the heavy rain made the narrow roads (C)[to flood] within minutes, (D)[forcing them] to turn back.
writingError.explanation_th: make + กรรม + กริยาช่องฐาน → made the roads flood (ไม่มี to)

writingError.stem: Had the firefighters (A)[arrived a] few minutes later, the flames (B)[would destroy] the entire wooden market (C)[that has] stood in the town center (D)[for almost] a century.
writingError.explanation_th: Had + V3 (= If clause 3) ผลต้องใช้ would have + V3 → would have destroyed

writingError.stem: (A)[Never I have seen] such a spectacular firework display as the one (B)[that lit] up the river last night (C)[during the] Loy Krathong festival (D)[celebrated across] the city.
writingError.explanation_th: ขึ้นต้นด้วย Never ต้อง inversion → Never have I seen

writingError.stem: Students who lose (A)[his] student card must report to the office immediately (B)[because the] card is required (C)[for borrowing] books and (D)[entering the] examination hall.
writingError.explanation_th: Students พหูพจน์ สรรพนามแสดงเจ้าของต้องใช้ their → lose their student cards

writingError.stem: After months of practice, my sister finally succeeded (A)[to pass] the driving test, (B)[which allowed] her (C)[to drive] our parents to the temple (D)[every Sunday] morning.
writingError.explanation_th: succeed in + V-ing → succeeded in passing the test

writingError.stem: It is necessary that every laboratory visitor (A)[wears] protective glasses at all times because chemical splashes (B)[can cause] permanent damage (C)[to the] eyes (D)[within seconds].
writingError.explanation_th: It is necessary that + subjunctive → every visitor wear (ไม่เติม s)

writingError.stem: Look at those dark clouds gathering over the mountains; it (A)[is raining] heavily soon, so we (B)[should move] the ceremony into the hall (C)[before the] guests (D)[start to] arrive.
writingError.explanation_th: คาดการณ์จากหลักฐานที่เห็น (เมฆดำ) ใช้ be going to → it is going to rain heavily soon

writingError.stem: The villagers showed great (A)[generous] to the flood victims by donating food, clothes, and money, (B)[which helped] many families survive (C)[during the] most difficult weeks (D)[of the] disaster.
writingError.explanation_th: หลัง great ในตำแหน่งกรรมต้องเป็นคำนาม → great generosity (generous เป็น adj.)

writingError.stem: The teacher praised the students, (A)[most of who] stayed after class to help clean the flooded library and (B)[dry the] damaged books (C)[so that] younger pupils could use them (D)[again next] term.
writingError.explanation_th: หลัง preposition (of) ต้องใช้ whom → most of whom stayed

writingError.stem: The annual sports day (A)[is hold] on the last Friday of November every year, and parents (B)[are invited] to watch their children (C)[compete in] a wide range (D)[of events].
writingError.explanation_th: Passive ต้องใช้ V3 → is held (hold → held)

writingError.stem: Some people believe city life is (A)[more exciting] than country life, but others argue that villages offer (B)[a peacefuler] atmosphere and (C)[stronger community] bonds (D)[than crowded] cities.
writingError.explanation_th: peaceful เป็นคำยาว (3 พยางค์) ทำขั้นกว่าด้วย more → a more peaceful atmosphere

writingError.stem: (A)[Walking along] the beach at sunrise, (B)[collecting shells], and (C)[to watch] the fishing boats return (D)[are my] grandfather's favorite ways to spend his retirement.
writingError.explanation_th: โครงสร้างขนาน: Walking, collecting, and watching — ต้องเป็น V-ing เหมือนกัน

writingError.stem: We watched (A)[a interesting] documentary about sea turtles last night, (B)[which explained] how plastic waste (C)[threatens their] survival (D)[in the] Gulf of Thailand.
writingError.explanation_th: interesting ขึ้นต้นด้วยเสียงสระ → an interesting documentary

writingError.stem: Mathematics (A)[are often considered] the most difficult subject in school, but our teacher always finds creative ways (B)[to make] the lessons enjoyable (C)[and easy] (D)[to understand].
writingError.explanation_th: ชื่อวิชาที่ลงท้าย -s (Mathematics, Physics) เป็นเอกพจน์ → is often considered

writingError.stem: The committee postponed the football final (A)[due to] the field was flooded after three days of heavy rain, (B)[disappointing hundreds] of fans (C)[who had] already bought tickets (D)[for the] match.
writingError.explanation_th: due to + นาม/V-ing — ตามด้วยประโยคต้องใช้ because the field was flooded

writingError.stem: (A)[Disappointing] by the exam results, Malee decided to change her study habits, (B)[turning off] her phone every evening and (C)[reviewing her] notes carefully (D)[before going] to bed.
writingError.explanation_th: มะลิ 'รู้สึกผิดหวัง' (ถูกกระทำ) ใช้ V3 → Disappointed by the exam results

writingError.stem: If I (A)[was] the director of this school, I (B)[would build] a larger canteen so that students (C)[would not] have to wait in long queues (D)[during the] lunch break.
writingError.explanation_th: If clause 2 (สมมติตรงข้ามปัจจุบัน) ใช้ were กับทุกประธาน → If I were the director

writingError.stem: Could you tell me (A)[where is the nearest bus stop] because I need (B)[to get] to the train station (C)[before nine] o'clock (D)[this evening?]
options: (A) where is the nearest bus stop
writingError.explanation_th: Indirect question เรียงแบบบอกเล่า → where the nearest bus stop is

writingError.stem: The twins look so similar that even their teachers sometimes confuse one with (A)[other], especially when they wear (B)[the same] uniform and (C)[tie their] hair (D)[in the] same style.
writingError.explanation_th: คู่ของสองสิ่ง: one ... the other → confuse one with the other

writingError.stem: The students practiced (A)[to present] their science projects in English for weeks (B)[before the] regional competition, (C)[hoping to] impress the judges (D)[with their] fluency.
writingError.explanation_th: practice + V-ing → practiced presenting

writingError.stem: The doctor recommended that my father (A)[takes] a complete rest for at least two weeks and (B)[avoid stressful] activities (C)[until his] blood pressure (D)[returns to] normal.
writingError.explanation_th: recommend that + subjunctive → my father take (สังเกต avoid ใน B ก็เป็นช่องฐาน)

writingError.stem: By the end of this year, the construction team (A)[will complete] the new gymnasium, which means students (B)[will be] able to train indoors (C)[during the] rainy season (D)[next year].
writingError.explanation_th: By + จุดเวลาอนาคต = เสร็จก่อนเวลานั้น ใช้ Future Perfect → will have completed

writingError.stem: Experts say that getting enough sleep is (A)[absolute necessary] for teenagers because the brain (B)[organizes new] information during the night, (C)[which improves] memory (D)[and concentration].
writingError.explanation_th: ขยายคำคุณศัพท์ necessary ต้องใช้ adverb → absolutely necessary

writingError.stem: This is the village (A)[which] my grandparents were born, (B)[where life] still moves slowly and (C)[where neighbors] treat one another (D)[like family] members.
writingError.explanation_th: ขยายสถานที่และประโยคหลังสมบูรณ์ ใช้ where → the village where my grandparents were born (หรือ in which)

writingError.stem: English (A)[is spoken] as an official language in many countries, and it (B)[is also using] widely in international business, science, (C)[and online] communication (D)[around the] world.
writingError.explanation_th: ภาษา 'ถูกใช้' ต้องเป็น Passive → is also used widely

writingError.stem: The final round of the quiz was (A)[by far more difficult] than the earlier rounds; in fact, it was (B)[the most] challenging competition (C)[our school] team has faced (D)[in recent] years.
writingError.explanation_th: by far ใช้เน้นขั้นสูงสุด ส่วนขั้นกว่าเน้นด้วย far/much → far more difficult than

writingError.stem: The reason the trip was cancelled (A)[is because] the bus company suddenly raised its prices, (B)[leaving the] organizers with a budget (C)[that could] no longer cover (D)[the transportation] costs.
writingError.explanation_th: The reason ... is that (ไม่ใช้ is because — ความหมายซ้ำซ้อน)

writingError.stem: My father plays (A)[a golf] with his colleagues every Saturday morning, (B)[claiming that] the exercise helps him (C)[stay healthy] and (D)[reduce stress] from work.
writingError.explanation_th: ชื่อกีฬาไม่ใช้ article → plays golf

writingError.stem: There (A)[is several reasons] why students should learn a second language, (B)[including better] job opportunities and (C)[a deeper] understanding (D)[of other] cultures.
writingError.explanation_th: There + กริยาผันตามนามข้างหลัง (reasons พหูพจน์) → There are several reasons

writingError.stem: The students wanted to interview the famous writer; (A)[therefore], she was too busy (B)[to accept] their invitation, (C)[so they] sent her questions (D)[by email] instead.
writingError.explanation_th: ใจความขัดแย้งกัน (อยากสัมภาษณ์ แต่เธอไม่ว่าง) ต้องใช้ however ไม่ใช่ therefore (ดังนั้น)

writingError.stem: The festival committee plans (A)[launching] a thousand lanterns into the night sky, but environmental groups warn that the burning paper (B)[may start] fires and (C)[harm animals] (D)[in nearby] forests.
writingError.explanation_th: plan + to-infinitive → plans to launch

writingError.stem: My grandmother says that if she (A)[had studied] English when she was young, she (B)[will travel] abroad more confidently now, instead of (C)[depending on] her grandchildren (D)[to translate] everything.
writingError.explanation_th: Mixed conditional: เงื่อนไขอดีต (had studied) + ผลปัจจุบัน (now) → would travel

writingError.stem: (A)[Rarely we see] such heavy rainfall in this region, so the children rushed outside (B)[to play] in the puddles (C)[before the] water drained away (D)[in the] afternoon sun.
writingError.explanation_th: ขึ้นต้นด้วย Rarely ต้อง inversion → Rarely do we see

writingError.stem: My friend lent me (A)[hers] notes before the history exam because I had been absent (B)[for an] entire week (C)[while recovering] (D)[from dengue] fever.
writingError.explanation_th: นำหน้าคำนามใช้ her (possessive adjective) → her notes (hers ใช้ลอย ๆ ไม่ตามด้วยนาม)

writingError.stem: Our teacher encouraged us (A)[joining] the national essay contest, saying that the experience (B)[would improve] our writing skills (C)[whether or] not (D)[we won] a prize.
writingError.explanation_th: encourage + กรรม + to-infinitive → encouraged us to join

writingError.stem: It is important that every application (A)[is submitted] before Friday noon because the committee (B)[will not] consider documents (C)[that arrive] after (D)[the official] deadline.
writingError.explanation_th: It is important that + subjunctive → every application be submitted

writingError.stem: Last summer, while the researchers (A)[were conducted] their fieldwork in the north, several unexpected discoveries (B)[were made] that (C)[would later change] how scientists (D)[understood] the region's history.
writingError.explanation_th: ประธาน (the researchers) เป็นผู้ลงมือเอง ต้องใช้ Past Continuous รูป active → were conducting | were conducted เป็น passive (ผิด เพราะนักวิจัยเป็นผู้กระทำ)

writingError.stem: Since the new manager (A)[joined] the company three years ago, the sales team (B)[has worked] tirelessly, and last month it (C)[has achieved] its highest revenue (D)[in its history].
writingError.explanation_th: last month เป็นเวลาเจาะจงในอดีต ต้องใช้ Past Simple → achieved | has achieved (Present Perfect) ใช้กับเวลาเจาะจงในอดีตไม่ได้

writingError.stem: The success of the project depended on the (A)[careful] planning of the team, whose (B)[able] to solve problems quickly impressed everyone at the (C)[international] conference held in (D)[Singapore].
writingError.explanation_th: หลัง whose ต้องเป็นคำนาม → whose ability to solve problems | able เป็น adjective (ผิดชนิดคำ)

writingError.stem: Although the medicine was (A)[widely] used for many years, recent studies have raised (B)[serious] doubts about its (C)[effectiveness] and its long-term (D)[safe] for young children.
writingError.explanation_th: หลัง its long-term ต้องเป็นคำนาม (ขนานกับ effectiveness) → safety | safe เป็น adjective (ผิดชนิดคำ)

writingError.stem: The scientist (A)[who discovered] the new species described it in a paper (B)[that was published] last year in a journal (C)[what is read] by experts (D)[all over the world].
writingError.explanation_th: ขยายคำนาม (a journal) ใช้ which/that ไม่ใช้ what → which is read | what ใช้เป็น relative pronoun ขยายคำนามไม่ได้

writingError.stem: The students (A)[which volunteered] for the project gained valuable experience (B)[that they could] later use in their careers, and many of them (C)[were offered] jobs by the companies (D)[they worked with].
writingError.explanation_th: ขยายคน (the students) ใช้ who → who volunteered | which ใช้กับสิ่งของ (ผิด)

writingError.stem: A new policy (A)[was introduced] last month to reduce waste, and since then the amount of plastic (B)[sent] to landfills (C)[has fallen] sharply, while a large amount of material (D)[is now recycle] instead.
writingError.explanation_th: Passive ต้องใช้ verb-to-be + กริยาช่อง 3 → is now recycled | recycle เป็นรูปฐาน (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The ancient temple, which (A)[attracts] thousands of visitors each year, (B)[was build] more than seven centuries ago and (C)[has been carefully preserved] by local communities (D)[ever since].
writingError.explanation_th: Passive อดีต ต้องใช้ was + กริยาช่อง 3 → was built | build เป็นรูปฐาน (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The new high-speed train is (A)[more faster] than the old one, and although tickets cost a little more, most passengers agree that the comfort it provides (B)[is well worth] the (C)[higher] price they (D)[have to pay].
writingError.explanation_th: fast พยางค์เดียว เติม -er → faster | more faster ซ้ำขั้นกว่า (ผิด ห้ามใช้ more คู่กับ -er)

writingError.stem: Many people believe that studying abroad is completely (A)[different] from studying at home, but in fact the two experiences are (B)[not so different] (C)[than] most students (D)[expect them to be].
writingError.explanation_th: โครงสร้าง (not) so + adj + as → not so different as | than ใช้กับ comparative (-er/more) ไม่ใช้กับ so...as (ผิด)

writingError.stem: Although the weather was extremely cold, the experienced climbers (A)[who led the group] (B)[they decided] to continue, believing that the summit (C)[was] only a short distance (D)[away].
writingError.explanation_th: ประธานซ้ำ (the climbers ... they) ต้องตัด they ออก → decided | การมีประธานซ้ำสองตัวในประโยคเดียวผิดโครงสร้าง

writingError.stem: The committee spent several weeks reviewing the proposal, and after considering all the (A)[possible risks], they finally approved it, (B)[even though] some members (C)[remained doubtful] (D)[but they accepted] the majority decision.
writingError.explanation_th: ใช้ even though แล้วห้ามมี but ซ้ำเชื่อมความขัดแย้งอีก → ตัด but เหลือ they accepted | even though ... but ผิดโครงสร้าง

writingError.stem: The president gave (A)[an inspiring] speech about (B)[the importance] of education, urging (C)[the every citizen] to support (D)[the new] reforms.
writingError.explanation_th: every ใช้กับนามเอกพจน์โดยไม่มี article → every citizen | the every ผิด (every ไม่ใช้คู่ the)

writingError.stem: After spending (A)[the year] abroad, she returned home with (B)[a deeper] understanding of (C)[other cultures] and (D)[a strong] desire to travel again.
writingError.explanation_th: กล่าวถึงครั้งแรกแบบไม่เจาะจง → a year abroad | the year สื่อเฉพาะเจาะจง (ผิดบริบท)

writingError.stem: The list of approved candidates (A)[was posted] yesterday, and each of the applicants (B)[whose name] appears on it (C)[has been] invited to an interview that (D)[take place] next week.
writingError.explanation_th: ประธานของอนุประโยค (an interview / that) เอกพจน์ → takes place | take ผิด SVA (ต้องเติม -s)

writingError.stem: Neither the manager nor the employees (A)[are aware] that the report (B)[contain] several errors that (C)[need] to be corrected before it (D)[is sent] to the head office.
writingError.explanation_th: ประธาน the report เอกพจน์ → contains | contain ผิด SVA (ต้องเติม -s)

writingError.stem: (A)[Despite] the heavy rain continued for hours, the festival organisers refused to cancel the event, (B)[since] thousands of people (C)[had already arrived], and rescheduling (D)[would have been] impossible.
writingError.explanation_th: ตามด้วยประโยค (the rain continued...) ต้องใช้ Although/Even though → Although | Despite ตามด้วยนาม/V-ing เท่านั้น (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The project was complex and time-consuming; (A)[nevertheless], the team completed it on schedule (B)[because] everyone cooperated, (C)[but also] the manager provided clear guidance (D)[throughout the process].
writingError.explanation_th: but also ต้องใช้คู่กับ not only; ที่นี่เป็นการเพิ่มเหตุผล ต้องใช้ and | but also เดี่ยว ๆ ผิดโครงสร้าง

writingError.stem: (A)[Founded] in 1995, the organisation has grown rapidly, (B)[help] millions of people in developing countries gain access to clean water and (C)[providing] training (D)[to improve] local farming methods.
writingError.explanation_th: วลี participle ขนานกับ providing → helping | help เป็นรูปฐาน (ผิด ต้องเป็น V-ing)

writingError.stem: The city council launched a campaign (A)[to encourage] recycling, (B)[hoping] to reduce landfill waste and (C)[to raise] public awareness, a goal (D)[achieve] only through long-term effort.
writingError.explanation_th: ลดรูป relative clause (a goal that is achieved) → achieved | achieve รูปฐาน (ผิด ต้องเป็น V3)

writingError.stem: If the government (A)[had invested] more in public transport during the past decade, traffic congestion (B)[would not be] as severe as it is today, and citizens (C)[will enjoy] cleaner air and (D)[shorter commutes].
writingError.explanation_th: ผลของเงื่อนไขสมมุติ (if + had invested) ใช้ would → would enjoy | will ใช้กับเงื่อนไขจริง (ผิดในประโยคสมมุติ)

writingError.stem: If I (A)[would have known] about the deadline earlier, I would have submitted my application on time, but nobody (B)[informed] me until it was (C)[too late] to (D)[do anything].
writingError.explanation_th: เงื่อนไขที่ 3 ในอนุประโยค if ใช้ Past Perfect → if I had known | would have known ใช้ในอนุประโยค if ไม่ได้ (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The tourists asked the guide (A)[politely] where (B)[they could find] a good restaurant, but he could not remember (C)[exactly] (D)[where was it] located.
writingError.explanation_th: คำถามซ้อน (indirect question) เรียงประธาน+กริยา ไม่ผันแบบคำถามตรง → where it was located | where was it ผิด

writingError.stem: At the museum, visitors can admire (A)[a remarkable collection] of (B)[Chinese ancient] ceramics, (C)[some of which] date back (D)[thousands of years].
writingError.explanation_th: ลำดับคำคุณศัพท์: อายุ (ancient) มาก่อนสัญชาติ (Chinese) → ancient Chinese ceramics | Chinese ancient ผิดลำดับ

writingError.stem: Between you and (A)[I], the new policy seems unfair, because it benefits the managers far more than (B)[it does] the ordinary workers (C)[who] depend on (D)[their] monthly wages.
writingError.explanation_th: หลังบุพบท between ต้องใช้สรรพนามกรรม → between you and me | I เป็นประธาน (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The company encourages all of its employees to take responsibility for (A)[their own] development, reminding (B)[them] that success depends largely on (C)[theirselves] and (D)[their] willingness to learn.
writingError.explanation_th: สรรพนามสะท้อนพหูพจน์ที่ถูกต้องคือ themselves | theirselves ไม่มีในภาษาอังกฤษ (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The manager suggested (A)[postponing] the meeting until next week, but the director insisted on (B)[to discuss] the budget immediately, (C)[arguing] that any delay would (D)[cause] further problems.
writingError.explanation_th: insist on + V-ing → insisted on discussing | to discuss ผิด (หลัง on ต้องเป็น gerund)

writingError.stem: The new employees are not used to (A)[working] such long hours, but they are willing (B)[to learn], and the company has promised (C)[to support] them by (D)[offer] additional training.
writingError.explanation_th: by + V-ing → by offering additional training | offer รูปฐาน (ผิด หลัง by ต้องเป็น gerund)

writingError.stem: The doctor strongly recommended that the patient (A)[avoid] fatty foods, (B)[exercise regularly], and (C)[gets] at least eight hours of sleep (D)[every night].
writingError.explanation_th: recommend that + ประธาน + กริยาฐาน (subjunctive) → get | gets ผิด (ห้ามเติม -s ในรูป subjunctive)

writingError.stem: It is essential that every applicant (A)[submits] all the required documents before the deadline, (B)[as] late submissions (C)[will not be] accepted (D)[under any circumstances].
writingError.explanation_th: It is essential that + ประธาน + กริยาฐาน (subjunctive) → submit | submits ผิด (ห้ามเติม -s)

writingError.stem: By the end of this year, the construction company (A)[will have completed] three major projects, all of which (B)[were started] before the pandemic and (C)[have faced] numerous delays that nobody (D)[expects] at the time.
writingError.explanation_th: บริบทอดีต (ความล่าช้าที่เกิดขึ้นแล้ว at the time) → nobody expected | expects (ปัจจุบัน) ผิดกาล

writingError.stem: When I arrived at the station yesterday, the train (A)[had already left], so I (B)[am waiting] for nearly an hour before the next one (C)[came], which made me (D)[late] for the interview.
writingError.explanation_th: เหตุการณ์อดีต (yesterday) → I waited | am waiting (ปัจจุบันต่อเนื่อง) ผิดกาล

writingError.stem: The scientists conducted the experiment with great (A)[precision], carefully recording every (B)[measurement] to ensure the (C)[reliable] of their results before publishing (D)[their findings].
writingError.explanation_th: หลัง the (และเป็นกรรมของ ensure) ต้องเป็นคำนาม → the reliability | reliable เป็น adjective (ผิดชนิดคำ)

writingError.stem: The company's (A)[decide] to expand into new markets was widely (B)[criticised] by analysts, who questioned whether it could remain (C)[profitable] without significant (D)[investment].
writingError.explanation_th: หลัง company's ต้องเป็นคำนาม → the company's decision | decide เป็นกริยา (ผิดชนิดคำ)

writingError.stem: The novel, (A)[which won] several awards, tells the story of a young woman (B)[whose family] loses everything during the war but (C)[who refuses] to give up hope, a theme (D)[what resonates] with many readers.
writingError.explanation_th: ขยายคำนาม (a theme) ใช้ that/which ไม่ใช้ what → that resonates | what ใช้เป็น relative ขยายนามไม่ได้

writingError.stem: The bridge (A)[that connects] the two cities, (B)[who was built] in the nineteenth century, is now considered a national treasure (C)[that attracts] tourists (D)[from around the world].
writingError.explanation_th: ขยายสิ่งของ (the bridge) ใช้ which ไม่ใช้ who → which was built | who ใช้กับคน (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The proposal (A)[was reviewed] by the committee last week, and after several changes (B)[had been made], it (C)[was finally accept] by all the members (D)[who attended] the meeting.
writingError.explanation_th: Passive ต้องใช้ verb-to-be + กริยาช่อง 3 → was finally accepted | accept รูปฐาน (ผิด)

writingError.stem: Thousands of trees (A)[are planting] every year as part of the reforestation programme, which (B)[is funded] by the government and (C)[supported] by volunteers (D)[who care] about the environment.
writingError.explanation_th: ต้นไม้ถูกปลูก (passive) → are planted | are planting เป็น active (ผิด เพราะต้นไม้เป็นผู้ถูกกระทำ)

writingError.stem: The more people learn about climate change, (A)[the more concerned] they become, yet many still believe that the problem is (B)[less urgent] than scientists claim and (C)[easier to solve] (D)[that it really is].
writingError.explanation_th: เปรียบเทียบขั้นกว่า (easier) ใช้ than → than it really is | that ผิด (comparison ต้องใช้ than)

writingError.stem: The latest smartphone is (A)[considerably more expensive] than its predecessor, but it is also (B)[the most fast] model the company has ever produced, offering (C)[far better] battery life and (D)[a sharper] screen.
writingError.explanation_th: fast พยางค์เดียว → the fastest | the most fast ผิด (ใช้ most คู่กับ -est ไม่ได้)

writingError.stem: The report highlighted several problems within the organisation, (A)[including] poor communication and low morale, (B)[which] the new director promised to address, (C)[because is] determined to restore (D)[its reputation].
writingError.explanation_th: อนุประโยค because ต้องมีประธาน → because she is determined | because is ขาดประธาน (ผิดโครงสร้าง)

writingError.stem: (A)[Because the heavy traffic], the delegates arrived late, and although the opening ceremony (B)[had to be delayed], the organisers managed to keep the rest of the schedule (C)[running smoothly] (D)[throughout the day].
writingError.explanation_th: ตามด้วยนาม (the heavy traffic) ต้องใช้ Because of → Because of the heavy traffic | Because ตามด้วยประโยคเต็มเท่านั้น (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The scientist made (A)[an important] discovery that could change (B)[the way] we treat disease, earning her (C)[a place] among (D)[most respected] researchers in the field.
writingError.explanation_th: ขั้นสูงสุดต้องมี the → the most respected researchers | most respected (ขาด the) ผิด

writingError.stem: She has always wanted to become (A)[an engineer], so after finishing (B)[the secondary school], she enrolled in (C)[a well-known] university to study (D)[mechanical engineering].
writingError.explanation_th: พูดถึงระดับการศึกษาทั่วไป ไม่ใช้ article → finishing secondary school | the secondary school สื่อโรงเรียนเฉพาะ (ผิดบริบท)

writingError.stem: The number of people working from home (A)[has increased] dramatically, and the data (B)[show] that productivity (C)[have remained] stable or even improved in many (D)[companies].
writingError.explanation_th: ประธาน productivity เป็นนามนับไม่ได้ (เอกพจน์) → has remained | have ผิด SVA

writingError.stem: (A)[There is] several reasons why the project failed, but the most important one (B)[was] a lack of funding, which (C)[made] it impossible to hire the experts the team (D)[needed].
writingError.explanation_th: There + กริยา ต้องตรงกับนามที่ตามมา (several reasons พหูพจน์) → There are | There is ผิด SVA

writingError.stem: The team worked hard to meet the deadline, (A)[and] they succeeded, (B)[although] they faced many obstacles; (C)[as a result], the client was delighted, (D)[despite] the final product exceeded all expectations.
writingError.explanation_th: ตามด้วยประโยค (the product exceeded...) และเป็นผลเชิงบวก ต้องใช้ and | despite ตามด้วยนาม/V-ing และความหมายขัดแย้ง (ผิด)

writingError.stem: Renewable energy is becoming cheaper every year; (A)[therefore], many countries are investing in it heavily, (B)[moreover] some governments still rely on coal (C)[because] it is familiar and (D)[relatively cheap] to produce.
writingError.explanation_th: ความหมายขัดแย้ง (พลังงานสะอาดถูกลง แต่ยังพึ่งถ่านหิน) ต้องใช้ however/yet → however | moreover = ยิ่งกว่านั้น (เพิ่มข้อมูล) ผิดความหมาย

writingError.stem: (A)[Built] on a hill overlooking the sea, the hotel offers stunning views, (B)[attracting] visitors from all over the country, (C)[make] it one of the most popular destinations (D)[to visit] in the region.
writingError.explanation_th: วลี participle แสดงผล → making it one of... | make รูปฐาน (ผิด ต้องเป็น V-ing)

writingError.stem: (A)[Disappoint] by the poor service, the customers complained to the manager, (B)[demanding] a refund and (C)[threatening] to post negative reviews (D)[unless] the problem was solved.
writingError.explanation_th: วลี participle แบบ passive (ถูกทำให้ผิดหวัง) → Disappointed by the poor service | Disappoint รูปฐาน (ผิด ต้องเป็น V3)

writingError.stem: If everyone reduced their energy consumption, the planet (A)[would benefit] enormously, pollution (B)[would decrease], and future generations (C)[would inherit] a world that (D)[will be] far healthier.
writingError.explanation_th: เงื่อนไขที่ 2 (if + reduced) ใช้ would ตลอด → a world that would be | will ใช้กับเงื่อนไขจริง (ผิดในประโยคสมมุติ)

writingError.stem: Unless the company improves its working conditions, it (A)[will continue] to lose talented staff, and if the situation (B)[will not change] soon, even its most loyal employees (C)[may decide] to leave (D)[in search of] better opportunities.
writingError.explanation_th: อนุประโยค if (เงื่อนไขจริง) ใช้ปัจจุบัน ไม่ใช้ will → if the situation does not change | will not change ผิด (ห้ามใช้ will ใน if-clause)

writingError.stem: The interviewer wanted to know (A)[how long] the candidate had worked abroad and (B)[why] she had decided to return, but she could not explain (C)[why did she leave] her previous job (D)[so suddenly].
writingError.explanation_th: คำถามซ้อน (indirect question) เรียงประธาน+กริยา ไม่ผันแบบคำถามตรง → why she left | why did she leave ผิด (ห้ามผัน did)

writingError.stem: The chef prepared (A)[a Thai delicious] meal for the guests, who praised not only its (B)[beautiful presentation] but also its (C)[rich flavours], making the evening (D)[truly memorable].
writingError.explanation_th: ลำดับคำคุณศัพท์: ความเห็น (delicious) มาก่อนสัญชาติ (Thai) → a delicious Thai meal | a Thai delicious ผิดลำดับ

writingError.stem: The award was shared between the two finalists, and although everyone congratulated (A)[them], the judges admitted that choosing between (B)[the two of them] had been difficult for (C)[the panel] and (D)[they].
writingError.explanation_th: หลังบุพบท for ต้องใช้สรรพนามกรรม → for the panel and them | they เป็นประธาน (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The organisation is proud of (A)[its] achievements, and (B)[it's] members work tirelessly to support local communities, helping families (C)[who] are in need and improving (D)[their] quality of life.
writingError.explanation_th: แสดงความเป็นเจ้าของใช้ its (ไม่มี apostrophe) → its members | it's = it is (ผิด ใช้แสดงความเป็นเจ้าของไม่ได้)

writingError.stem: The students were looking forward to (A)[visiting] the museum, but their teacher warned them (B)[to behave] politely and avoid (C)[to touch] any of the exhibits, (D)[reminding] them of the rules.
writingError.explanation_th: avoid + V-ing → avoid touching | to touch ผิด (avoid ตามด้วย gerund)

writingError.stem: The manager refused (A)[considering] the proposal at first, but after his colleagues persuaded him (B)[to reconsider], he agreed (C)[to hold] another meeting and promised (D)[to make] a decision soon.
writingError.explanation_th: refuse + to V → refused to consider | considering ผิด (refuse ตามด้วย to-infinitive ไม่ใช่ gerund)

writingError.stem: The committee proposed that the budget (A)[be increased], that new staff (B)[be hired], that training (C)[be provided], and that the plan (D)[is reviewed] every six months.
writingError.explanation_th: propose that + ประธาน + รูปฐาน be (subjunctive) → that the plan be reviewed | is reviewed ผิด (ต้องเป็นรูปฐาน be)

writingError.stem: The professor suggested that the student (A)[revise] his thesis, that he (B)[submits] it before the end of the month, and that he (C)[prepare] thoroughly for the (D)[oral defence].
writingError.explanation_th: suggest that + ประธาน + กริยาฐาน (subjunctive) → that he submit | submits ผิด (ห้ามเติม -s)

writingError.stem: The factory (A)[has produced] electric cars since 2018, and by the time it celebrates its tenth anniversary, it (B)[produced] more than a million vehicles for customers (C)[around the world] who value (D)[clean transport].
writingError.explanation_th: by the time + เหตุการณ์อนาคต ใช้ Future Perfect → will have produced | produced (อดีต) ผิดกาล

writingError.stem: The volunteers (A)[have been working] at the shelter for three months now, and they (B)[say] that the experience (C)[has taught] them more than any classroom ever (D)[does].
writingError.explanation_th: เทียบกับอดีต (more than any classroom ever did) → did | does (ปัจจุบัน) ผิดกาลในบริบทนี้

writingError.stem: The (A)[wide] of the river makes it dangerous to cross during the rainy season, when the (B)[powerful] current can sweep away anything in (C)[its] path, including (D)[heavy] vehicles.
writingError.explanation_th: ตำแหน่งประธาน/หลัง the ต้องเป็นคำนาม → the width of the river | wide เป็น adjective (ผิดชนิดคำ)

writingError.stem: The government introduced new measures to (A)[strengthen] the economy, hoping to (B)[reduce] unemployment and (C)[encouragement] foreign companies to invest in (D)[local industries].
writingError.explanation_th: ขนานกับ strengthen/reduce (หลัง to ต้องเป็นกริยา) → encourage | encouragement เป็นคำนาม (ผิดชนิดคำ)

writingError.stem: The journalist interviewed several refugees (A)[whose homes] had been destroyed, (B)[which] had fled across the border, and (C)[who now live] in temporary camps (D)[that lack] basic facilities.
writingError.explanation_th: ขยายคน (refugees) ใช้ who → who had fled | which ใช้กับสิ่งของ (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The laboratory (A)[where the vaccine] was developed has received international recognition, and the team of scientists (B)[who worked] there, (C)[most of whom] were under forty, became famous for a breakthrough (D)[whose] changed modern medicine.
writingError.explanation_th: ขยาย a breakthrough เป็นประธานของ changed → that/which | whose ต้องตามด้วยคำนาม (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The bridge (A)[is currently repairing] after the recent earthquake, and until the work (B)[is completed], drivers (C)[are advised] to use alternative routes (D)[suggested] by the authorities.
writingError.explanation_th: สะพานถูกซ่อม (passive ต่อเนื่อง) → is being repaired | is repairing เป็น active (ผิด สะพานเป็นผู้ถูกกระทำ)

writingError.stem: The award-winning documentary, (A)[which was filmed] over five years, (B)[has been praised] by critics, and it (C)[will show] in cinemas nationwide before it (D)[is released] online.
writingError.explanation_th: สารคดีถูกฉาย (passive อนาคต) → will be shown | will show เป็น active (ผิด)

writingError.stem: Scientists have found that the new material is (A)[twice as strong] as steel, much (B)[more lighter] than aluminium, and (C)[considerably cheaper] to produce (D)[than expected].
writingError.explanation_th: light เติม -er → lighter | more lighter ซ้ำขั้นกว่า (ผิด ห้ามใช้ more คู่กับ -er)

writingError.stem: The committee agreed that the second proposal was (A)[far more practical] than the first, (B)[less expensive] to implement, and (C)[more likely] to succeed (D)[as anyone had imagined].
writingError.explanation_th: หลัง comparative (more likely) ใช้ than → than anyone had imagined | as ผิด (ใช้กับ as...as เท่านั้น)

writingError.stem: (A)[Despite of] the difficulties, the team remained optimistic, and (B)[although] progress was slow, they (C)[never gave up], confident that their efforts (D)[would eventually pay off].
writingError.explanation_th: despite ตามด้วยนามโดยตรง ไม่มี of → Despite the difficulties | Despite of ผิด (in spite OF แต่ despite ไม่มี of)

writingError.stem: The new library, which opened last year, has become extremely popular among students, (A)[offering] quiet study spaces, (B)[providing] free internet access, and (C)[it has] thousands of books (D)[available] for borrowing.
writingError.explanation_th: ต้องขนานกับ offering/providing (participle) → containing thousands of books | it has ทำให้โครงสร้างไม่ขนาน (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The museum displays (A)[a fascinating] collection of artefacts from (B)[the ancient Egypt], including jewellery, pottery, and statues that reveal (C)[the daily lives] of people who lived (D)[thousands of years ago].
writingError.explanation_th: ชื่อประเทศไม่ใช้ the → ancient Egypt | the ancient Egypt ผิด (ชื่อเฉพาะประเทศไม่ใส่ the)

writingError.stem: The article describes how (A)[a brilliant] young woman from (B)[a poor] family became (C)[a respected] doctor and later (D)[the symbol] of hope for her entire community.
writingError.explanation_th: กล่าวถึงครั้งแรกแบบไม่เจาะจง → a symbol of hope | the symbol สื่อเฉพาะเจาะจง (ผิดบริบท)

writingError.stem: The quality of the products (A)[have improved] significantly since the new manager arrived, and customer satisfaction (B)[has risen], which (C)[suggests] that the changes (D)[are working].
writingError.explanation_th: ประธาน the quality เอกพจน์ (of the products เป็นส่วนขยาย) → has improved | have ผิด SVA

writingError.stem: Every one of the new regulations (A)[is designed] to protect consumers, and the government insists that the rules (B)[are] necessary, even though each company (C)[have] to spend more on (D)[safety checks].
writingError.explanation_th: ประธาน each company เอกพจน์ → has to spend | have ผิด SVA (each + เอกพจน์เสมอ)

writingError.stem: The new employee was highly qualified; (A)[however], she struggled at first (B)[because of] she was unfamiliar with the company's systems, but with training she (C)[soon] became (D)[one of the best] performers.
writingError.explanation_th: ตามด้วยประโยค (she was unfamiliar...) ต้องใช้ because → because she was unfamiliar | because of ตามด้วยนามเท่านั้น (ผิด)

writingError.stem: Companies must reduce their carbon emissions; (A)[otherwise], they will face heavy fines, (B)[and] their reputation will suffer, (C)[so] most firms are taking action, (D)[although] investing in cleaner technology now to avoid problems later.
writingError.explanation_th: ไม่มีความขัดแย้ง (กำลังลงมือ + กำลังลงทุนในเทคโนโลยีสะอาด) → and investing | although = แม้ว่า (ผิดความหมาย)

writingError.stem: (A)[Encourage] by the positive feedback, the author decided to write a sequel, (B)[spending] two years on research and (C)[interviewing] dozens of experts (D)[to ensure] accuracy.
writingError.explanation_th: วลี participle แบบ passive (ถูกให้กำลังใจ) → Encouraged by the positive feedback | Encourage รูปฐาน (ผิด ต้องเป็น V3)

writingError.stem: The charity organised a concert (A)[to raise] money for flood victims, (B)[attracting] thousands of people and (C)[raise] awareness about the disaster, an event (D)[remembered] for years afterwards.
writingError.explanation_th: ขนานกับ attracting (participle) → raising awareness | raise รูปฐาน (ผิด ต้องเป็น V-ing)

writingError.stem: If sea levels continue to rise, many coastal cities (A)[will face] serious flooding, millions of people (B)[would lose] their homes, and entire ecosystems (C)[will be] destroyed (D)[within decades].
writingError.explanation_th: เงื่อนไขที่ 1 (if + continue) ใช้ will ตลอด → will lose | would ใช้กับเงื่อนไขสมมุติ (ผิด ต้องสอดคล้องกับ will face/will be)

writingError.stem: Had the company listened to its customers, it (A)[would have avoided] the scandal, its sales (B)[would not have fallen], and its reputation (C)[would have remained] intact, but instead it (D)[ignores] all the warnings.
writingError.explanation_th: บริบทอดีตจริง (เหตุการณ์เกิดไปแล้ว) → it ignored all the warnings | ignores (ปัจจุบัน) ผิดกาล

writingError.stem: I still remember (A)[how was my first day] at the new school, when I felt nervous (B)[meeting] so many strangers and (C)[struggled] to find my way (D)[around the building].
writingError.explanation_th: คำถามซ้อน (indirect) เรียงประธาน+กริยา ไม่ผัน → how my first day was | how was my first day ผิด (ห้ามผันแบบคำถามตรง)

writingError.stem: The shop sells (A)[a wide variety] of products, from (B)[expensive imported] watches to (C)[plastic small] toys, all displayed (D)[neatly] on the shelves.
writingError.explanation_th: ลำดับคำคุณศัพท์: ขนาด (small) มาก่อนวัสดุ (plastic) → small plastic toys | plastic small ผิดลำดับ

writingError.stem: My colleagues and I worked late every night last week, but the manager thanked only my supervisor and (A)[me], ignoring all the effort (B)[us] had put in, which made (C)[everyone] feel (D)[undervalued].
writingError.explanation_th: เป็นประธานของ had put in ต้องใช้สรรพนามประธาน → the effort we had put in | us เป็นกรรม (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The twins are so similar that even their teachers cannot tell (A)[them] apart, and (B)[they] often confuse one with (C)[the other], much to (D)[theirs] amusement.
writingError.explanation_th: ก่อนคำนาม (amusement) ใช้ possessive adjective → their amusement | theirs เป็น possessive pronoun (ใช้แทนคำนาม ไม่วางหน้าคำนาม)

writingError.stem: The researchers spent months (A)[to collect] data, analysing thousands of samples and (B)[recording] their observations before (C)[publishing] a report that recommended (D)[banning] the chemical.
writingError.explanation_th: spend time + V-ing → spent months collecting | to collect ผิด (หลัง spend + เวลา ต้องเป็น gerund)

writingError.stem: The athlete admitted (A)[taking] performance-enhancing drugs but denied (B)[knowing] they were banned, and he agreed (C)[stopping] immediately to avoid (D)[damaging] his reputation further.
writingError.explanation_th: agree + to V → agreed to stop | stopping ผิด (agree ตามด้วย to-infinitive ไม่ใช่ gerund)

writingError.stem: The law requires that every driver (A)[wear] a seatbelt, that every child (B)[sits] in the back seat, and that no one (C)[use] a mobile phone (D)[while driving].
writingError.explanation_th: require that + ประธาน + กริยาฐาน (subjunctive) → that every child sit | sits ผิด (ห้ามเติม -s)

writingError.stem: The advisor recommended that the student (A)[apply] early, that she (B)[prepare] a strong portfolio, that she (C)[contact] potential supervisors, and that her referees (D)[submits] their letters on time.
writingError.explanation_th: recommend that + ประธาน + กริยาฐาน (subjunctive) → that her referees submit | submits ผิด (ห้ามเติม -s)

writingError.stem: The internet (A)[has changed] the way we live, and over the past two decades it (B)[has transformed] industries, created new jobs, and (C)[is connecting] billions of people long before most of us (D)[realised] its full potential.
writingError.explanation_th: ขนานกับ transformed/created (อดีต) และมี long before ... realised → connected | is connecting (ปัจจุบันต่อเนื่อง) ผิดกาล

writingError.stem: By the time the firefighters arrived, the flames (A)[spread] to three neighbouring buildings, and although they (B)[worked] all night, the damage (C)[had already become] severe by the time the fire (D)[was finally controlled].
writingError.explanation_th: เหตุการณ์เกิดก่อนอีกเหตุการณ์อดีต (by the time arrived) → had spread | spread (Past Simple) ผิด ต้องเป็น Past Perfect

writingError.stem: The new policy aims to promote (A)[economic] growth while protecting the (B)[natural] environment, a goal that requires (C)[careful] planning and strong political (D)[determine].
writingError.explanation_th: หลัง strong political ต้องเป็นคำนาม → determination | determine เป็นกริยา (ผิดชนิดคำ)

writingError.stem: The professor's research has made a (A)[significant] contribution to the field, and her (B)[able] to explain complex ideas (C)[simply] has earned her (D)[widespread] respect.
writingError.explanation_th: หลัง her (possessive) ต้องเป็นคำนาม → her ability to explain | able เป็น adjective (ผิดชนิดคำ)

writingError.stem: The teacher praised the student (A)[who had written] the essay, (B)[which] explored a difficult topic, in a style (C)[what impressed] the examiners (D)[so much].
writingError.explanation_th: ขยายคำนาม (a style) ใช้ that/which ไม่ใช้ what → that impressed | what ขยายนามไม่ได้ (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The engineers (A)[which designed] the new system worked closely with the architects (B)[whose vision] shaped the project, producing a building (C)[that combines] beauty with function (D)[in remarkable ways].
writingError.explanation_th: ขยายคน (the engineers) ใช้ who → who designed | which ใช้กับสิ่งของ (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The painting (A)[was stolen] from the gallery last year, and despite a long investigation, the thief (B)[has not been caught], although several suspects (C)[have been questioned] and the artwork (D)[still searching for].
writingError.explanation_th: ภาพถูกตามหา (passive) → is still being searched for | still searching for เป็น active (ผิด ภาพเป็นผู้ถูกกระทำ)

writingError.stem: The new stadium, which (A)[can hold] eighty thousand spectators, (B)[was design] by a famous architect and (C)[is expected] to host international matches (D)[in the future].
writingError.explanation_th: Passive อดีต ต้องใช้ was + กริยาช่อง 3 → was designed | design รูปฐาน (ผิด)

writingError.stem: Studies show that the new teaching method is (A)[more effective] than the traditional one, helping students learn (B)[faster] and remember information (C)[more long] than before, with results that (D)[surprised] researchers.
writingError.explanation_th: long พยางค์เดียว เติม -er → longer | more long ผิด (ใช้ more กับพยางค์เดียวไม่ได้)

writingError.stem: The film was (A)[much enjoyable] than I had expected, with a plot (B)[more original] than most thrillers and acting (C)[far better] than the critics (D)[had suggested].
writingError.explanation_th: enjoyable เป็นคำหลายพยางค์ ต้องใช้ more + than → much more enjoyable than | much enjoyable ขาด more (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The new shopping centre, which opened last month, has attracted huge crowds, (A)[offering] hundreds of shops, (B)[providing] ample parking, and (C)[creating] many jobs, (D)[it has] also eased unemployment in the area.
writingError.explanation_th: ขนานกับ offering/providing/creating หรือเชื่อมด้วยตัวเชื่อม → and has also eased | it has ทำให้เกิด comma splice (ผิด)

writingError.stem: (A)[Even though] the company invested heavily in advertising, sales remained low, (B)[but the management] refused to change its strategy, (C)[believing] that the market (D)[would eventually recover].
writingError.explanation_th: ใช้ Even though แล้วห้ามมี but ซ้ำ → ตัด but เหลือ the management refused | Even though ... but ผิดโครงสร้าง

writingError.stem: The documentary explores (A)[the history] of jazz, tracing its roots from (B)[the southern] United States to its influence on (C)[a modern music] around the world, featuring (D)[rare] recordings.
writingError.explanation_th: music เป็นนามนับไม่ได้ (กล่าวทั่วไป) ไม่ใช้ a → modern music | a modern music ผิด (uncountable ไม่ใช้ a)

writingError.stem: The student showed (A)[the great] interest in science from an early age, spending hours reading (B)[books] about space and dreaming of becoming (C)[an astronaut] who would explore (D)[distant planets].
writingError.explanation_th: interest แบบนามธรรมทั่วไปไม่ใช้ the → showed great interest | the great interest ผิด (ไม่ได้เจาะจง)

writingError.stem: The collection of rare books (A)[is kept] in a special room, and although the library (B)[has] strict rules, each of the volumes (C)[is] available to researchers who (D)[promises] to handle them carefully.
writingError.explanation_th: ประธาน who = researchers (พหูพจน์) → who promise | promises ผิด SVA (ห้ามเติม -s)

writingError.stem: There (A)[are many] reasons for the decline, but the most significant factor (B)[are] the lack of investment, which (C)[has] discouraged innovation and (D)[caused] many skilled workers to leave.
writingError.explanation_th: ประธาน the most significant factor เอกพจน์ → is the lack of investment | are ผิด SVA

writingError.stem: Many people worry about privacy online; (A)[therefore], they use stronger passwords, (B)[and] they avoid suspicious links, (C)[unless] some still share too much personal information (D)[without thinking].
writingError.explanation_th: ความหมายขัดแย้ง (ระวังความเป็นส่วนตัว แต่บางคนยังแชร์มากเกินไป) → yet/but | unless = เว้นแต่ (ผิดความหมาย)

writingError.stem: (A)[Although of] the strong competition, the small bakery survived, (B)[partly because] of its loyal customers and (C)[partly because of] its unique recipes, (D)[which] could not be found elsewhere.
writingError.explanation_th: ตามด้วยนาม (the strong competition) ต้องใช้ Despite/In spite of → Despite the strong competition | Although of ไม่มีในภาษาอังกฤษ (Although ตามด้วยประโยค)

writingError.stem: (A)[Inspired] by her travels, the photographer published a book, (B)[capturing] the beauty of remote landscapes and (C)[documenting] the lives of local people, (D)[earn] international acclaim.
writingError.explanation_th: วลี participle แสดงผล → earning international acclaim | earn รูปฐาน (ผิด ต้องเป็น V-ing)

writingError.stem: The company launched a campaign (A)[to reduce] plastic waste, (B)[introduce] reusable packaging, (C)[encouraging] customers to recycle, and (D)[offering] discounts for returning containers.
writingError.explanation_th: วลี participle ขนานกับ encouraging/offering → introducing reusable packaging | introduce รูปฐาน (ผิด ต้องเป็น V-ing)

writingError.stem: If the experiment had been designed more carefully, the results (A)[would have been more reliable], the conclusions (B)[would have been] stronger, and the paper (C)[will have been] accepted by the journal (D)[without difficulty].
writingError.explanation_th: เงื่อนไขที่ 3 (if + had been designed) ใช้ would have → would have been accepted | will have been ผิด (ต้องเป็น would ในประโยคสมมุติอดีต)

writingError.stem: If she (A)[will study] harder next term, she will pass the exam, and if she (B)[continues] to work hard, she (C)[may even win] a scholarship that (D)[would change] her life.
writingError.explanation_th: อนุประโยค if (เงื่อนไขที่ 1) ใช้ปัจจุบัน ไม่ใช้ will → if she studies harder | will study ผิด (ห้าม will ใน if-clause)

writingError.stem: The customer asked the assistant (A)[whether] the product was available, (B)[how much] it cost, and (C)[when] it would arrive, but the assistant did not know (D)[what was the answer].
writingError.explanation_th: คำถามซ้อน (indirect) เรียงประธาน+กริยา ไม่ผัน → what the answer was | what was the answer ผิด (ห้ามผันแบบคำถามตรง)

writingError.stem: The antique dealer showed us (A)[a beautiful old] clock, (B)[a silver French] mirror, and several (C)[hand-painted] plates, all of which (D)[were extremely valuable].
writingError.explanation_th: ลำดับคำคุณศัพท์: สัญชาติ (French) มาก่อนวัสดุ (silver) → a French silver mirror | a silver French ผิดลำดับ

writingError.stem: My brother and I built the treehouse (A)[ourselves], and although our father offered to help (B)[us], we wanted to prove to (C)[ourself] that we could do it (D)[on our own].
writingError.explanation_th: ประธานพหูพจน์ (we) ใช้ ourselves → prove to ourselves | ourself ไม่ใช้กับ we (ผิด)

writingError.stem: (A)[Me and my friends] went to the concert last weekend, and although the tickets were expensive, (B)[we] all agreed that it was worth the money, an experience (C)[none of us] would ever forget (D)[for the rest of our lives].
options: (D) for the rest of our lives
writingError.explanation_th: เป็นประธานของ went ต้องใช้สรรพนามประธาน (และวางผู้อื่นก่อน) → My friends and I went | Me and my friends ผิด (me เป็นกรรม)

writingError.stem: The scientist devoted her life (A)[to studying] rare diseases, refusing (B)[to give up] even when funding was cut, and she succeeded in (C)[developing] a treatment that helped (D)[to saving] countless lives.
writingError.explanation_th: help + (to) V ฐาน → helped to save countless lives | to saving ผิด (หลัง to ต้องเป็นกริยาฐาน ไม่ใช่ V-ing)

writingError.stem: After (A)[graduating] from university, she considered (B)[to work] abroad, but eventually decided (C)[to stay] in her hometown, where she could (D)[help] her family.
writingError.explanation_th: consider + V-ing → considered working abroad | to work ผิด (consider ตามด้วย gerund)

writingError.stem: The judge ordered that the defendant (A)[remain] in custody, that the trial (B)[begin] within thirty days, and that all evidence (C)[is presented] fairly (D)[in court].
writingError.explanation_th: order that + ประธาน + (should) be + V3 (subjunctive) → that all evidence be presented | is presented ผิด (ต้องเป็นรูปฐาน be)

writingError.stem: It is vital that the new system (A)[is tested] thoroughly before launch, that staff (B)[be trained] properly, and that customers (C)[be informed] of any changes (D)[in advance].
writingError.explanation_th: It is vital that + ประธาน + (should) be + V3 (subjunctive) → that the new system be tested | is tested ผิด (ต้องเป็นรูปฐาน be)

writingError.stem: The company (A)[announced] yesterday that it (B)[would close] two factories, a decision that (C)[has shocked] employees who (D)[work] there for over twenty years.
writingError.explanation_th: พนักงานทำงานมาก่อนเหตุการณ์อดีต (ก่อนการประกาศ) → had worked there for over twenty years | work (ปัจจุบัน) ผิดกาล

writingError.stem: The scientists (A)[have been studying] the virus for months, and although they (B)[are making] good progress yesterday, much work (C)[remains] before a vaccine (D)[can be produced].
writingError.explanation_th: yesterday เป็นอดีต → made good progress yesterday | are making (ปัจจุบันต่อเนื่อง) ผิดกาล

writingError.stem: The athlete trained hard for years, showing remarkable (A)[determination] and (B)[discipline], qualities that eventually led to her (C)[succeed] at the highest (D)[level] of competition.
writingError.explanation_th: หลัง her และเป็นกรรมของ led to ต้องเป็นคำนาม → her success | succeed เป็นกริยา (ผิดชนิดคำ)

writingError.stem: The (A)[arrive] of the new technology transformed the industry, allowing factories to operate more (B)[efficiently], reduce (C)[costs], and improve product (D)[quality].
writingError.explanation_th: ตำแหน่งประธาน/หลัง the ต้องเป็นคำนาม → the arrival of the new technology | arrive เป็นกริยา (ผิดชนิดคำ)

writingError.stem: The hospital treats patients (A)[who come] from all over the region, many of (B)[whom] cannot afford private care, in a building (C)[that was donated] by a charity (D)[what supports] medical research.
writingError.explanation_th: ขยายคำนาม (a charity) ใช้ that/which ไม่ใช้ what → that supports | what ขยายนามไม่ได้ (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The famous author, (A)[whose novels] have sold millions of copies, lives in a quiet village (B)[who attracts] few tourists, surrounded by hills (C)[that have] inspired (D)[much of] her writing.
writingError.explanation_th: ขยายสถานที่/สิ่งของ (a quiet village) ใช้ which/that ไม่ใช้ who → which attracts | who ใช้กับคน (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The new vaccine (A)[was developed] in record time, and after it (B)[had been tested] on thousands of volunteers, it (C)[was approve] by health authorities (D)[within months].
writingError.explanation_th: Passive ต้องใช้ verb-to-be + กริยาช่อง 3 → was approved | approve รูปฐาน (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The historic building (A)[is renovating] at the moment, and while the work (B)[is being carried out], visitors (C)[are not allowed] inside the areas (D)[that remain] unsafe.
writingError.explanation_th: อาคารถูกบูรณะ (passive ต่อเนื่อง) → is being renovated | is renovating เป็น active (ผิด อาคารเป็นผู้ถูกกระทำ)

writingError.stem: The research shows that students who sleep well perform (A)[better] in exams, concentrate (B)[more easily], and feel (C)[less anxious] (D)[as those] who stay up late.
writingError.explanation_th: หลัง comparative (less anxious) ใช้ than → than those who stay up late | as ผิด (ใช้กับ as...as เท่านั้น)

writingError.stem: Compared with last year, this year's festival was (A)[far more successful], attracting (B)[the most large] crowd in its history and generating (C)[significantly higher] revenue (D)[than expected].
writingError.explanation_th: large พยางค์เดียว → the largest | the most large ผิด (ใช้ most คู่กับ -est ไม่ได้)

writingError.stem: The manager explained that sales had dropped, (A)[which] worried the investors, (B)[but] he reassured them, (C)[because believed] that the situation would improve (D)[before long].
writingError.explanation_th: อนุประโยค because ต้องมีประธาน → because he believed | because believed ขาดประธาน (ผิดโครงสร้าง)

writingError.stem: (A)[Although the rising costs], the restaurant kept its prices low, (B)[which] pleased regular customers, (C)[even though] it reduced profits, (D)[forcing] the owner to cut other expenses.
writingError.explanation_th: ตามด้วยนาม (the rising costs) ต้องใช้ Despite/In spite of → Despite the rising costs | Although ตามด้วยประโยคเต็มเท่านั้น (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The lecture covered (A)[the history] of space exploration, from (B)[the first] satellite to recent missions, inspiring students to study (C)[physics] and pursue careers in (D)[the science].
writingError.explanation_th: ศาสตร์ทั่วไป (science) ไม่ใช้ the → careers in science | the science ผิด (กล่าวถึงสาขาวิชาทั่วไปไม่ใส่ the)

writingError.stem: After the earthquake, (A)[the people] of the town worked together, showing (B)[a great] courage, (C)[remarkable] generosity, and (D)[a willingness] to help one another.
writingError.explanation_th: courage เป็นนามนับไม่ได้ ไม่ใช้ a → showing great courage | a great courage ผิด (uncountable ไม่ใช้ a)

writingError.stem: The information provided by the witnesses (A)[was] helpful, and although the evidence (B)[points] to a single suspect, the police insist that more investigation (C)[are] needed before anyone (D)[is charged].
writingError.explanation_th: ประธาน investigation เป็นนามนับไม่ได้ (เอกพจน์) → is needed | are ผิด SVA

writingError.stem: The teacher, along with several students, (A)[are organising] a charity event, and because everyone (B)[is] enthusiastic, the preparations (C)[have gone] smoothly and the date (D)[has been] confirmed.
writingError.explanation_th: ประธานหลักคือ the teacher (เอกพจน์); along with ... ไม่เปลี่ยนพจน์ → is organising | are ผิด SVA

writingError.stem: The new bridge cut travel time dramatically; (A)[consequently], trade increased, (B)[and] tourism grew, (C)[yet] maintenance proved costly, (D)[because] the council struggled to find enough funds.
writingError.explanation_th: ความสัมพันธ์เหตุ-ผลกลับด้าน (ค่าบำรุงสูง จึงหาเงินยาก) → so the council struggled | because ทำให้เหตุผลกลับด้าน (ผิดตรรกะ)

writingError.stem: The author's first book was a great success; (A)[in contrast], her second received mixed reviews, (B)[therefore] many readers still admired her honest writing style, (C)[which] explored difficult themes (D)[with great sensitivity].
writingError.explanation_th: ความหมายขัดแย้ง (รีวิวปนเป แต่ผู้อ่านยังชื่นชม) → yet/however | therefore = ดังนั้น (ผิดความหมาย ไม่ใช่ผลที่ตามมา)

writingError.stem: (A)[Faced] with rising competition, the company changed its strategy, (B)[investing] in new technology and (C)[hire] experienced staff, a move (D)[praised] by industry analysts.
writingError.explanation_th: ขนานกับ investing (participle) → hiring experienced staff | hire รูปฐาน (ผิด ต้องเป็น V-ing)

writingError.stem: (A)[Build] over a century ago, the railway still operates today, (B)[carrying] thousands of passengers daily and (C)[connecting] remote towns (D)[to major cities].
writingError.explanation_th: วลี participle แบบ passive (ถูกสร้าง) → Built over a century ago | Build รูปฐาน (ผิด ต้องเป็น V3)

writingError.stem: If the city had built more parks, residents (A)[would have enjoyed] cleaner air, children (B)[would have had] safe places to play, and the community (C)[would have become] healthier, but unfortunately the council (D)[chooses] to build offices instead.
writingError.explanation_th: บริบทอดีตจริง (สภาตัดสินใจไปแล้ว) → the council chose to build | chooses (ปัจจุบัน) ผิดกาล

writingError.stem: If the medicine is taken correctly, it (A)[will relieve] the symptoms quickly, but if patients (B)[will ignore] the instructions, they (C)[may suffer] side effects that (D)[could be] serious.
writingError.explanation_th: อนุประโยค if (เงื่อนไขที่ 1) ใช้ปัจจุบัน ไม่ใช้ will → if patients ignore | will ignore ผิด (ห้าม will ใน if-clause)

writingError.stem: The new student was not sure (A)[where] the library was, (B)[how] the timetable worked, or (C)[who was her teacher], so she asked a friendly classmate (D)[for help].
writingError.explanation_th: คำถามซ้อน (indirect) เรียงประธาน+กริยา ไม่ผัน → who her teacher was | who was her teacher ผิด (ห้ามผันแบบคำถามตรง)

writingError.stem: The gallery exhibited (A)[a bronze huge] statue, (B)[a delicate glass] vase, and (C)[several modern] paintings, all of which (D)[drew large crowds].
writingError.explanation_th: ลำดับคำคุณศัพท์: ขนาด (huge) มาก่อนวัสดุ (bronze) → a huge bronze statue | a bronze huge ผิดลำดับ

writingError.stem: The director thanked the cast and crew, praising (A)[them] for their hard work and reminding (B)[everyone] that the film's success belonged to (C)[all of them], not just to (D)[she].
writingError.explanation_th: หลังบุพบท to ต้องใช้สรรพนามกรรม → not just to her | she เป็นประธาน (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The two companies announced a merger, claiming that the deal would benefit (A)[their] customers, but critics argued that (B)[it's] real purpose was to reduce competition and increase (C)[their profits] at (D)[everyone's] expense.
writingError.explanation_th: แสดงความเป็นเจ้าของใช้ its (ไม่มี apostrophe) → its real purpose | it's = it is (ผิด)

writingError.stem: The committee discussed (A)[reducing] the budget, considered (B)[postponing] the project, and finally decided (C)[cutting] several programmes, a choice that risked (D)[damaging] public services.
writingError.explanation_th: decide + to V → decided to cut | cutting ผิด (decide ตามด้วย to-infinitive ไม่ใช่ gerund)

writingError.stem: The young entrepreneur succeeded in (A)[to build] a global brand, mainly by (B)[listening] to customers, (C)[adapting] quickly to change, and never (D)[giving up] on her vision.
writingError.explanation_th: succeed in + V-ing → succeeded in building | to build ผิด (หลัง in ต้องเป็น gerund)

writingError.stem: The new rules require that each application (A)[include] two references, that the fee (B)[be paid] in advance, that all forms (C)[be signed], and that the deadline (D)[is respected] by everyone.
writingError.explanation_th: require that + ประธาน + (should) be + V3 (subjunctive) → that the deadline be respected | is respected ผิด (ต้องเป็นรูปฐาน be)

writingError.stem: It is crucial that the report (A)[be finished] on time, that it (B)[contains] accurate data, that it (C)[be reviewed] by an expert, and that it (D)[be submitted] before the deadline.
writingError.explanation_th: It is crucial that + ประธาน + กริยาฐาน (subjunctive) → that it contain accurate data | contains ผิด (ห้ามเติม -s)

writingError.stem: The bookshop (A)[is standing] on the same corner for nearly a hundred years, and over the decades it (B)[has served] generations of readers who (C)[have valued] its (D)[wide selection] of rare books.
writingError.explanation_th: ระยะเวลา (for nearly a hundred years) → has stood/has been standing | is standing (ปัจจุบันต่อเนื่องล้วน) ผิดกาล
